scenarios: features/live-crew.feature:Estelle sends the Crew to the target the Quartermaster names
features/live-crew.feature:Estelle ends the run when the Quartermaster reports all green
features/live-crew.feature:Estelle loops the Crew until the Quartermaster's verdict turns green
